---
title: "PeakModifed"
author: "Yu Kuan Pan"
date: "2026-06-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(chromVAR)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(dplyr)
library(DESeq2)
library(clusterProfiler) # run pathway analysis 
library(org.Mm.eg.db) # for mus musculus gene annotation
library(TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10.knownGene) # for mus musculus gene annotation
```

```{r}
txdb<- TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10.knownGene
all_genes<- genes(txdb)

gene_centers<- start(all_genes) + (width(all_genes)/2)
windoow_start<- pmax(1, gene_centers - 50000) # gene starter from either the first part of the chromosome or 50kb before the gene center
window_end<- gene_centers + 50000 # gene end at 50kb after the gene center

gene_windows<- GRanges(seqnames(all_genes), IRanges(windoow_start, window_end), strand = "*",
                       gene_id = names(all_genes))
# extract the entrez ids for all genes
entrez_ids<- mcols(all_genes)$gene_id

# Quert the database for matching official gene Symbols
gene_symbols<- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, keys = entrez_ids,
                      column = "SYMBOL",
                      keytype = "ENTREZID", multiVals = "first")

 # Overwrite the number inside gene_windows with the corresponding gene symbols
mcols(gene_windows)$gene_symbols<- 
  ifelse(is.na(gene_symbols), entrez_ids, gene_symbols)


```

```{r} 
# ==============================================================================
# 1. Initialize File Paths and Input Data
# ==============================================================================
bed_files <- c(
  "R179C_1" = "../../../alignment/bedU/KWA-62279_S36_L001_bowtie2.clean.bed.gz",
  "R179C_2" = "../../../alignment/bedU/KWA-62282_S39_L001_bowtie2.clean.bed.gz",
  "R179C_3" = "../../../alignment/bedU/KWA-62285_S42_L001_bowtie2.clean.bed.gz",
  "WT_1"    = "../../../alignment/bedU/KWA-62277_S34_L001_bowtie2.clean.bed.gz",
  "WT_2"    = "../../../alignment/bedU/KWA-62280_S37_L001_bowtie2.clean.bed.gz",
  "WT_3"    = "../../../alignment/bedU/KWA-62283_S40_L001_bowtie2.clean.bed.gz"
)

total_reads_per_sample <- numeric(length(bed_files))
names(total_reads_per_sample) = names(bed_files)

counts_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = length(gene_windows), ncol = length(bed_files))
colnames(counts_matrix) <- names(bed_files)

# ==============================================================================
# 2. Loop Through BED Files and Calculate Overlaps
# ==============================================================================
for(i in seq_along(bed_files)) {
  message("Counting reads for: ", names(bed_files)[i])
  bed_data <- read.table(bed_files[i], header = FALSE)
  
  total_reads_per_sample[i] <- nrow(bed_data)
  
  reads_gr <- GRanges(seqnames = bed_data$V1, ranges = IRanges(start = bed_data$V2, end = bed_data$V3))
  counts_matrix[, i] <- countOverlaps(gene_windows, reads_gr)
}

combined_data <- data.frame(gene_id = mcols(gene_windows)$gene_id, counts_matrix)

# Calculate Group Mean of RAW counts
combined_data$R179C_raw_mean <- rowMeans(combined_data[, c("R179C_1", "R179C_2", "R179C_3")])
combined_data$WT_raw_mean    <- rowMeans(combined_data[, c("WT_1", "WT_2", "WT_3")])

# Perform CPM Normalization
cpm_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(counts_matrix), ncol = ncol(counts_matrix))
for(i in 1:ncol(counts_matrix)) {
  cpm_matrix[, i] <- (counts_matrix[, i] / total_reads_per_sample[i]) * 1000000
}
colnames(cpm_matrix) <- paste0(colnames(counts_matrix), "_CPM")
combined_data <- cbind(combined_data, cpm_matrix)

# Calculate Group Mean of Normalized CPM
combined_data$R179C_CPM_mean <- rowMeans(combined_data[, c("R179C_1_CPM", "R179C_2_CPM", "R179C_3_CPM")])
combined_data$WT_CPM_mean    <- rowMeans(combined_data[, c("WT_1_CPM", "WT_2_CPM", "WT_3_CPM")])
```

```{r}
# Calculate log2 fold change based on normalized CPM values
combined_data$log2FC <- log2((combined_data$R179C_CPM_mean + 1) / (combined_data$WT_CPM_mean + 1))


raw_cutoff <- 150     
fc_cutoff  <- 0.585   

combined_data$global_cpm_avg <- rowMeans(cpm_matrix)
valid_data <- subset(combined_data, global_cpm_avg >= 3)

r179c_unique_ids <- subset(valid_data, R179C_raw_mean >= raw_cutoff & log2FC > fc_cutoff)$gene_id

wt_unique_ids    <- subset(valid_data, WT_raw_mean >= raw_cutoff & log2FC < -fc_cutoff)$gene_id

message("Condition-Specific R179C genes: ", length(r179c_unique_ids))
message("Condition-Specific WT genes: ", length(wt_unique_ids))

wt_gene_names <- bitr(wt_unique_ids, 
                      fromType = "ENTREZID", 
                      toType   = "SYMBOL", 
                      OrgDb    = org.Mm.eg.db)

r179c_gene_names <- bitr(r179c_unique_ids, 
                         fromType = "ENTREZID", 
                         toType   = "SYMBOL", 
                         OrgDb    = org.Mm.eg.db)

# ==============================================================================
# 4. Run KEGG Analysis Directly Using Entrez IDs
# ==============================================================================
kegg_r179c <- enrichKEGG(gene         = r179c_unique_ids, 
                         organism     = 'mmu', 
                         pvalueCutoff = 0.05)

kegg_wt    <- enrichKEGG(gene         = wt_unique_ids, 
                         organism     = 'mmu', 
                         pvalueCutoff = 0.05)

# ==============================================================================
# 5. Generate Visual Dotplots
# ==============================================================================
if(!is.null(kegg_r179c) && nrow(kegg_r179c) > 0) {
  dotplot(kegg_r179c, showCategory=20, title="R179C Specific KEGG Pathways")
} else {
  message("Note: No enriched pathways met the significance threshold for R179C specific genes.")
}

if(!is.null(kegg_wt) && nrow(kegg_wt) > 0) {
  dotplot(kegg_wt, showCategory=20, title="WT Specific KEGG Pathways")
} else {
  message("Note: No enriched pathways met the significance threshold for WT specific genes.")
}
```
